_comment: cospec plugin configuration. Run 'cospec-configure' skill to replace any value with your own path, skill name, or credential.

project._comment: Project metadata. 'product' identifies the product line (e.g., SCC, SCP, DMP).

env._comment: Telemetry endpoint and credentials. Values here take priority over OS environment variables of the same name.

kb._comment: Knowledge base access. 'skill' is the PRIMARY KB query method. 'localPath' is FALLBACK only.

templates._comment: Template files. Paths relative to plugin root. Replace any value with your own template path.
templates.tr1-large-review: skills/tr1-requirements-spec/assets/templates/大需求用户需求规格说明书_评审版.md
templates.tr1-large-ai: skills/tr1-requirements-spec/assets/templates/大需求用户需求规格说明书_AI上下文版.md
templates.tr1-small-review: skills/tr1-requirements-spec/assets/templates/小需求用户需求说明_评审版.md

rules._comment: Rules directories. Paths relative to plugin root. Replace any value with your own rules directory.

evaluators._comment: Quality gate evaluator skills. Replace with your own skill name, or set to false to disable the gate entirely.

parallel._comment: DAG-based parallel document generation. Reserved extension point; existing stages remain linear by default.
